name: UBA : MaaS360 device out of compliance due to OS version
notes: Device is not compliant because it required updated OS versions
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM MaaS360 Security
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Event ID match OS_VERSION
when any of Event Category match COMPLIANCE
